mapper.select: SELECT * FROM seats ORDER BY row_num, seat_number
SELECT * FROM seats WHERE hall_id = #{hallId} ORDER BY row_num, seat_number

SELECT s.* FROM seats s JOIN movie_sessions ms ON ms.hall_id = s.hall_id WHERE ms.id = #{sessionId} AND s.id NOT IN (SELECT rs.seat_id FROM reservation_seats rs JOIN reservations r ON r.id = rs.reservation_id WHERE r.session_id = #{sessionId}) ORDER BY s.row_num, s.seat_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seats (hall_id, row_num, seat_number, is_booked) VALUES (#{hallId}, #{rowNum}, #{seatNumber}, #{isBooked})
